name: Query AI Status
summary_zh: 查询 AI 平台 Tab 状态
description: Get the status of all AI platform tabs captured by the aiClaw extension, including ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok. Returns information such as tabId, URL, active status, and login status for each tab. This is the first step for bots to perceive the AI platform environment in the browser, ensuring your Bot always operates on the correct tab.
description_zh: 获取当前所有由 aiClaw 扩展捕获的 AI 平台标签页状态,包括 ChatGPT、Gemini、Grok。返回每个标签页的 tabId、URL、是否活动、登录状态等信息。这是机器人感知浏览器中 AI 平台环境的第一步,确保您的 Bot 始终在正确的标签页上执行操作。

name: Send AI Message
summary: Send message to specified AI platform
summary_zh: 向指定 AI 平台发送消息
description: Send a message to the specified AI platform (such as ChatGPT) and get the AI's raw response. Supports continuing conversations in existing threads (via conversationId) or sending new messages on the current page. The system automatically inputs the message into the AI platform's input box via DOM manipulation and submits it, then returns the AI's complete raw response text. Completely passes through the AI platform's raw reply without any data processing or formatting.
description_zh: 向指定的 AI 平台(如 ChatGPT)发送消息并获取 AI 的原始回复。支持在现有对话中继续对话(通过 conversationId)或在当前页面发送新消息。系统会自动通过 DOM 操作将消息输入到 AI 平台的输入框并提交,然后返回 AI 的完整原始响应文本。完全透传 AI 平台的原始回复,不做任何数据处理或格式化。
response: {"success":true,"response":"Hello! I'm doing well, thank you for asking. How can I help you today?"}

name: New AI Conversation
summary_zh: 创建新的 AI 对话
description: Create a brand new conversation on the specified AI platform. Currently mainly used for the ChatGPT platform. This operation clicks the "New Conversation" button via DOM manipulation, clearing the current context and providing a clean conversation environment for subsequent message interactions. Suitable for scenarios that require starting a new topic or avoiding context interference.
description_zh: 在指定的 AI 平台上创建一个全新的对话。目前主要用于 ChatGPT 平台。该操作会通过 DOM 操作点击"新对话"按钮,清空当前上下文,为后续的消息交互提供一个干净的对话环境。适用于需要开始全新话题或避免上下文干扰的场景。

name: Navigate AI Platform
summary: Navigate AI platform to home page
summary_zh: 导航 AI 平台到首页
description: Navigate all tabs of the specified AI platform to its home page. This is a convenient reset operation that allows the Bot to quickly restore the browser environment to the AI platform's main interface. Supports platforms such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok. This operation automatically identifies all open tabs for that platform and uniformly navigates them to the home page URL.
description_zh: 将指定 AI 平台的所有标签页导航到其首页。这是一个便捷的重置操作,可以让 Bot 快速将浏览器环境恢复到 AI 平台的主界面。支持 ChatGPT、Gemini、Grok 等平台。该操作会自动识别该平台的所有打开标签页并统一导航到首页 URL。
